content.en:
It's been a long time again.

The Ten Pivot Golden Plate was finally cultivated by Ye Tian to the level of the Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure by using the power of the Death Tribulation, and the effect of assisting in comprehending the dimensional rules was even better.

And as time passed, Ye Tian obtained more and more resources, but there were also more and more battles in the extra-dimensional territory, and there were killings in the fifth realm everywhere, and even a hegemon-level force with a fifth realm was destroyed.

this day.

A treasure was born near the Ka Ye Buddha Gate, and the competition for two Sixth Realm multi-dimensional beings was immediately ushered in.

The battle of the multi-dimensional life in the sixth realm was too terrifying, affecting too many territories, even if the Ka Ye Buddha Sect did not want to participate, but it was still destroyed by the aftermath, and countless living beings fell, including one of the fifth realms.

There were only a few powerful Fifth Realm members left who escaped with the powerful Innate Multidimensional "Six-Nine-Three" Arcana, and those two Sixth Realm Multidimensional Beings didn't want to kill them, otherwise they wouldn't be able to escape.

When Ye Tian arrived, the two Sixth Realms were gone, and the treasures were gone.

Another period of time passed.

Territory of four thousand one hundred and six.

A river was born here, but it doesn't seem to be in the current dimension, and it doesn't seem to be in other dimensions, it seems unreal, but it seems to be real.

Whew!!

A name appeared in the Fifth Realm.

These Fifth Realms were all attracted by this river, and they were all excited.

"It's there again, the Duowei Ruins River, if you can find the Duowei Ruins Stone in the Duowei Ruin River, you can make the dimensional void in your body turn into a stone and break through to the sixth realm!" the group of fifth realms said excitedly.

Of course, the premise of everything is still to meet the requirements for breakthroughs, and if you can't even meet the requirements for breakthroughs, it is impossible to break through.

At the same time, a large number of Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation creatures appeared, and they also appeared here.

At this time, some of the Fifth Realms were very hesitant, should they go and snatch the Duowei Ruins Stone?

"Rob, if you can't break through the sixth realm, even if you survive this Death Multidimensional Tribulation, you may not have any hope of surviving the next Death Multidimensional Tribulation!"

Whew!!

They rushed into the Duowei Ruins River one after another, but there were also a few Fifth Realm who were not strong and were very sorry for their lives, so they left one after another.

Wow!

A figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Duowei Rui River, Duowei Rui Stone, it seems that there is another harvest!"

The Duowei Ruins Stone can help the Fifth Realm break through the Sixth Realm, but he will not use foreign objects to break through, but he can keep the Duowei Ruins Stone and give it to his relatives in the future, so that they can break through to the sixth with the help of the Duowei Stone.

Wow!

Ye Tian immediately escaped into the Duowei River.

The interior of the Duowei River is vast, with countless rivers, but it cannot be touched, as if it is illusory.

However, the vastness of the void here is real, and once you enter, you will enter an incomparably vast multidimensional ruin river multidimensional void.

Thundered!!!!

The Fifth Realm and those multi-dimensional tribulation creatures were fighting and killing, and soon there were also multi-dimensional tribulation creatures targeting Ye Tian, but they were killed by him casually.

Ye Tian quickly shuttled through the Duowei Ruins River, looking for the traces of the Duowei Ruins Stone.

The Duowei Ruins Stone should not be difficult to find, after all, the Duowei Ruins Stone is the only physical treasure in the Duowei Ruins River, and it is naturally easy to perceive.

Time passes slowly.

Soon.

Somewhere in the Duowei River, fierce battles broke out.

Ye Tian shuttled over and saw several fifth-realm and seven-eight-headed fifth-realm multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures killing, and there was a multi-dimensional ruin stone here.

Although the multi-dimensional ruin stone is an entity, it can be taken away, but it is not easy to take it away, the connection between the multi-dimensional ruin stone and the multi-dimensional ruin river is very deep, and the connection point between the illusory and the real dimension must be cut off in order to separate the multi-dimensional ruin stone from the multi-dimensional ruin river.

The strength of the general Fifth Realm is not strong, and it takes a long time to separate the Multidimensional Ruin Stone from the Duodimensional Ruin River.

But now, with the hindrance of these Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation Creatures, these Fifth Realms simply don't have time to separate the Multidimensional Ruins Stone from the Duodimensional Ruins River.

Ye Tian immediately made a move, instantly killing these Fifth Realm Multi-Dimensional Tribulation creatures, and then grabbed the Multi-Dimensional Ruins Stone with one hand.

"Open!"

Ye Tian gently tugged and directly dragged away the connection between the reality and the illusory dimension between the multidimensional ruin stone and the multidimensional ruin river.

Seeing this scene, the other Fifth Realms were stunned.

Ye Tian's strength was really beyond their expectations, instantly killing these fifth-realm multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures, reaching out and grabbing it, he grabbed this multi-dimensional ruin stone, what terrifying strength was needed!

"I'll take the Duowei Ruins Stone, you don't have any opinions, right?"

Ye Tian asked lightly.

"I didn't ...... No comments!"

These Fifth Realms lowered their heads one after another, not daring to look at Ye Tian.

Where do they dare to have an opinion, Ye Tian can kill them all, unless they want to die.

Wow!

Ye Tian left.

At this time, a fifth realm sighed with emotion: "Ye Tian Realm Lord has obtained the multi-dimensional ruin stone, and his soul will has reached the eleventh dimension, and the dimensional rule realm has also reached the standard, if he hits the sixth realm, he can impact it now." "

"In this way, another superdimensional realm of the sixth realm will be born!"

They were extremely envious of Ye Tian, and they also wanted to become the transcendent realm of the sixth realm!

After obtaining the Duowei Ruins Stone, Ye Tian left.

As far as he knew, the Duowei Ruin River could almost only give birth to a Duowei Ruins Stone, and it would be a waste of time to continue looking for it.

Soon, the other Fifth Realms also left, and there are a lot of multi-dimensional Tribulation creatures in the Fifth Realm here, and there are no multi-dimensional ruin stones, so there is no point in continuing to stay here for 3.4.

......

Returning to the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate, Ye Tian continued to practice and comprehend the rules of the dimension.

Tens of millions of extra-dimensional epochs have passed, and the Ten Pivot Golden Plate has transformed again, becoming the Innate Multi-dimensional Treasure of the Four Tribulations, and the effect is even better.

In the years that followed, there were successive Sixth Realm multidimensional beings entering the Extradimensional Realm, which led to the fall of some Fifth Realms.

Especially in the later stage of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, the frequency of the appearance of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life is a bit high, although it is only those sixth realm multidimensional lifeforms, they appear again and again.

Hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs later.

The Death Multidimensional Tribulation is coming to an end, and this time is the most dangerous time, because it is easy to give birth to amazing treasures, but it will also lead to the Great Battle of the Sixth Realm.
